大穴を出るのにどれぐらいかかるのか占って……<br>ああ、道具がないっ！ なんで:
I was going to divine how long it would take to get out of the Abyss...
Ah, I don't have my tools! Why don't I have them! Waaaaah!
占いができないだけでこんなにポンコツになるかね……<br>ま、あんだけ当たる占い:
Not being able to divine makes you this hopeless? Well, with your
accuracy, I have to rely on you.
司令官、私なんて置いていっていいんですよ。<br>占いができない私なんて、ダメな:
Commander, it's fine to leave someone like me behind. Without my
fortune telling, I'm just a useless big sister...
ちょっとダメな可愛いお姉さんを置き去りにする理由なんてないぞ。<br>むしろ積極:
There's no reason to abandon a slightly useless but cute big sister.
Rather, I want to take you along.
いいの……？ <br>占いの道具が何もないんですよ……？: Is that really okay...? I don't have any fortune telling tools at all...?
俺は水盆だの魔道具だのを信じたわけじゃない。<br>メレムの言うことだから信じた:
It's not that I believed in scrying basins or magic tools. I believed
because it was what you, Merem, said.
……どうして信じてくれたんです？<br>そりゃ私の占いは当たりますけど……: ...Why did you trust me? I mean, my predictions are accurate, but...
まあ、当たってたからってのも事実だ。<br>最初はメレムのことを、どこぞのスパイ:
Well, it's true that they were accurate. At first, I suspected you might
be some kind of spy, you know.
え、えええ～～っ！ スパイっ！？ <br>どうしてそんなふうに思われちゃったんで: E-Ehhhh! A spy! Why would you think that?
初対面なのにアリシアとの関係を見破ってみせただろ。<br>事情を知ってるぞってア:
You saw through my relationship with Alicia at our first meeting,
right? I thought you were trying to show off that you knew the situation.
じゃあ私を疑いながらここまで一緒に来たんですか……？: So you came all this way with me while still suspicious of me...?
最初は、と言っただろ。女関係は改めろ、と説教された時点で、<br>こいつはただの:
I said 'at first,' didn't I? When you lectured me about reforming my
womanizing ways, I realized you were a kind-hearted fortune teller.
だってぇ、本当に改めたほうがいいと思ったので……: B-but, I really thought you should change your ways...
構わないさ。司令官と呼ばれてる相手に説教をするなんて、<br>なかなか気合いの入:
I don't mind. Lecturing someone who's addressed as Commander
shows you're quite a spirited fortune teller.
そこまで結果を曲げないってのは、<br>本当に当たる占いなんだって誇りがなければ:
Not twisting the results that far... You'd only do that if you were
proud your fortune telling's truly accurate, right?
ちゃんと当てられると思わないなら、<br>占ったりしないですしぃ……: If I didn't think I could get it right, I wouldn't bother divining...
それに、占いを信じずに利用しようとする人には、<br>絶対にしたがわないって決め:
Besides, I've decided that I absolutely won't follow people who don't
believe in fortune telling and try to use it.
ほー、そういうやつもいたのか？: Hoh, there were people like that?
はい、私の占いが当たるからって、<br>望む結果が出るまで何度でも占わせようとす:
Yes, there are important people who, because my readings are
accurate, make me keep repeating until they get the result they want...
ああ……権力者の望む結果だけを出す、<br>そういう占いを仕事にしてるやつもいる:
Yeah... I've heard there are fortune tellers who make a living only by
telling powerful people what they want to hear.
いますいます！ １人の占い師として許せませんねっ！<br>占いとは運命の一端を示:
Yes, exactly! I can't forgive that! Fortune telling is about showing a
part of fate and serving as a guide for the path one should choose!
運命のほうを都合よく歪めようだなんて、<br>そんな人に正しい占いができるわけあ:
To try and distort fate to suit themselves... there's no way such a
person can give a correct reading!
メレムの言うことなら信じてみようって思えたのは、<br>まさにそういうところだよ:
The reason I felt I could trust what you say, Merem, is precisely
because of that.
自分の占った結果を、誰よりもメレム自身が信じてる。<br>だからこそ俺も信じてみ:
You believe in your own readings more than anyone else. That's
exactly why I feel I can trust them too.
信じられる占い師メレムの見た、この大穴に待ち受ける幸運。<br>そりゃ確認してみ:
The trustworthy fortune teller Merem saw good fortune awaiting in
this Abyss. Of course that makes me want to see it for myself.
ま、女性関係について改める気はないが。: Well, it's not like I plan to change my ways when it comes to women.
……そこは本当に改善したほうがいいと思うんですぅ。: ... I really think you should work on that part, you know.
<size=48>――大穴浅層 分かれ道</size>: <size=48>——Shallow Layers of the Abyss, Fork in the Road</size>
わああ、また分かれ道ですよっ！<br>どうしよう、誰か進む道を教えてぇ……司令官:
Waaah, it's another fork! What should we do? Someone tell me which
way to go... Commander, do a reading...
俺が占えるわけないだろ……: It's not like I can tell fortunes...
そうだ！ メレム、道具を使わない占いはできないのか？<br>星座占いとか人相占い:
That's it! Merem, can't you do a reading without tools? Like
horoscopes or physiognomy...
え？ ええ、占いであればどのようなことでも。: Huh? Oh, yes, I can do any kind of fortune telling.
もっとも生年月日のように変わらないものでは、人生全体を見ることしか<br>できま:
But with something unchangeable like a birthdate, I can only see the
overall life... so it's meaningless here, you know!
変わらないものじゃダメでも、他ならいけるのか？<br>例えば俺の手を見て占うって:
If unchangeable things won't work, can you do something else? For
example, how about reading my palm?
短期間で変わるもんじゃないだろうが、不変ってこともない。<br>メレムなら俺の手:
It's not something that changes overnight, but it's not immutable
either. You can read my immediate future from my palm, can't you, Merem?
……それは～～、うぅ……、<br>もしかしたら……可能、かもしれません。: ... That is... ugh... maybe... it might be possible.
……昏き星、汝の運命は大きく揺れ動いている。<br>その手もまた常に変動する未来:
...Dark Star, your fate is in great upheaval.
Your palm, too, should show an ever-changing future.
メレムは<user>の手を取り、ゆっくりと指を這わせる。<br>そして目にすら見:
Merem took the Commander's hand and slowly ran her fingers over it.
Then she traced the faint lines that were nearly invisible.
ええ、未来は変わっていません。あなたは強い運気を得ている。<br>この大穴で大い:
Yes, the future hasn't changed. You've gained strong luck.
You'll encounter great fortune in the Abyss.
……っていう感じなんですけどぉ……。<br>どう、でしょう……？: ...That's the reading, but... What do you think...?
ああ、一番知りたかったことを教えてくれたよ。<br>さすがだ、メレム。:
Yeah, you told me what I most wanted to hear.
As expected of you, Merem.
えええっ！？ さっきと同じ結果だったんですよぉ！？<br>何も新しいことなんて言: Ehhh! That was the same result as before! I didn't say anything new!
それでいいんだよ。<br>さあ行くぞメレム、この左の道だ。:
That's just fine.
Come on, Merem, this left path.
カンって……<br>あああ、行かないで司令官、待って～！: 'Your gut?' ... Aaah, don't go, Commander, wait!
――見覚えのない道を歩くことしばし。<br>探していたものはすぐに見つかった。:
—After walking down an unfamiliar path for a while,
they soon found what they were looking for.
なるほどな、さすがメレムの占いだ、よく当たる。<br>見てみろ、当たりに落ちてい:
I see, as expected of Merem's fortune-telling—it's really accurate.
Look, that shiny stone on the ground here.
これ……魔石、ですね……？<br>それも少なくない魔力を秘めてる……:
This... is a magic stone, isn't it?
It's holding a fair amount of magic power too...
ああ。付近に鉱脈があるのは間違いない。<br>こりゃ大発見だぞ！:
Yeah. No doubt there's an ore vein nearby.
This is a great find!
これが司令官が巡り合うはずだった幸運……。<br>でも、どうしてここにあるって分:
So this is the fortune you were destined to encounter, Commander...
But how did you know it was here...?
占いの結果はまだ幸運と巡り合えるって内容だっただろ。: The reading said you'd still meet with good fortune, didn't it?
だったら俺が選んだ道の先に幸運があると思ってたんだ。: Then I thought that good fortune would be ahead on the path I chose.
そんなにも私を信じてたんですか……？: Did you really trust me that much...?
疑う理由がないだろう。<br>ここまでの占いは全て当たってたんだ。:
There's no reason to doubt.
Every prediction you've made so far has been spot on.
それに何も見つからなくたって、別に構わないさ。<br>メレムと２人で冒険をするっ:
And even if we found nothing, it wouldn't matter. I've already been
blessed with the fortune of adventuring with you, Merem.
し、司令官……。<br>はい、私も……楽しい冒険でした。: C-Commander... Yes, I enjoyed the adventure too.
今後も期待してるぞ、メレム。<br>司令官お抱えとして、都合のいい占いをしろなん:
I'm counting on you going forward, Merem. I won't ask you to give
convenient readings just because you're my fortune teller.
たとえ俺が嫌がるとしても、メレムが良いと思える未来へ道を示してくれ。<br>その:
Even if I don't like it, show me the way to a future you think is good. I
can't promise I'll follow it, though.
……じゃあ１つだけ、実は途中で占ったことがあるんです。<br>ちょっと恥ずかしい:
Well... actually, I did a reading along the way. I kept it secret because
it's a bit embarrassing, but... do you want to hear?
気になるな、教えてくれよ。: You've got me curious. Go on, tell me.
では――昏き星、世界の極点となるものよ。<br>汝に運命を指し示そう。私の占いの:
Then—O Dark Star, who shall become the axis of the world. I shall
reveal your fate. According to my divination—
あなたと私の相性は……けっこういい感じ、です。: Our compatibility is... pretty good, I think.
もっと親しくすると素敵な未来があるんじゃないかなって……、<br>私は思いますよ:
I think if we get closer, there could be a wonderful future... what do
you think?
……そうか、そりゃいいな。<br>じゃあ気軽に大穴探索にも誘わせてもらおう。:
I see. That's good to hear. Then let me invite you to explore the
Abyss together.
いつでも声をかけてください。<br>占いでも魔法でも、力になります～！: Call on me anytime. Whether it's divination or magic, I'll help!
<size=48>――数日後 見通す者・メレムの占い館</size>: <size=48>—A few days later, at the Seer Merem's Fortune-Telling Shop.</size>
では、あなたが占ってほしい内容を話してください。: Now, please tell me what you'd like me to divine.
ん……クルルがご主人さまともっとなかよくなれるか、<br>おしえてほしい。:
Hmm... Kururu wants to know if she can become good friends with
Master.
……ご主人さま……司令官、ですか。<br>分かりました、占いましょう。: ...Master... Commander, you mean? Understood, I'll do a reading.
そんなに占ってほしいわけではないのですが……私と司令官の相性が<br>どんな感じ:
It's not like I'm dying to have my fortune told, but I'm a little curious
about how well the Commander and I match...
……まあ、とりあえず占いましょう。<br>結果は保証できませんが。:
...Well, let's do the reading anyway. I can't guarantee the result,
though.
んふふ～、最高に決まってるのは知っていますが、<br>旦那さまとわたしの恋愛運を:
Nfufu, I know it's bound to be perfect, but could you take a look at
my love fortune with my Honey!♪
勝手に結果を決めるのなら、占う必要はありませんがっ！？<br>もういいです！ 占:
If you're going to decide the result yourself, then there's no need for
a reading. That's enough. Divination is over. We're closing today!
みんなして司令官との相性、恋愛運を見たいって……！<br>どれだけの相手と縁を結:
Everyone wants to see their compatibility and love luck with the
Commander... Just how many people is that man involved with!
占って欲しいことがあって来たんだが……、<br>今日はもう店じまいか？: I came for a reading, but... is the shop already closed?
……いえ、ちょうどあなたについて占ったところです。<br>絶対に当たりますので、:
...No, I just finished a reading about you. It will be absolutely
accurate, so listen carefully.
お、おう？<br>どんな結果だったんだ。: Oh, yeah? What did it say?
今日も女難の相が出ています。<br>私以外とは出歩かないように……！:
The sign of woman troubles appears again today. Don't go out with
anyone besides me...!
